Interface OutboxDialectProvider

public interface OutboxDialectProvider
Service-loaded factory for OutboxDialect. Implementations are registered via META-INF/services/io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi.OutboxDialectProvider (or via provides ... with ... in module-info.java).

JdbcOutbox runs auto-detection on its first publish: it opens a connection, inspects DatabaseMetaData, asks every registered provider whether it supports the database, and picks the matching provider with the highest priority. Built-in providers use priority 0; third-party providers may use larger values to take precedence.

Since:
0.1.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    OutboxDialect
    create()
    Creates a fresh dialect instance.
    default int
    priority()
    Priority used to break ties when multiple providers report supports for the same database.
    boolean
    supports(DatabaseMetaData metaData)
    Returns true if this provider's dialect can handle the database described by metaData.

  • Method Details

    • supports

      boolean supports(DatabaseMetaData metaData) throws SQLException
      Returns true if this provider's dialect can handle the database described by metaData.
      Parameters:
      metaData - the JDBC connection metadata for the database being inspected.
      Returns:
      true if this provider's dialect should be used for this database.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if metadata access fails. Auto-detection treats any thrown SQLException as "this provider does not match" and tries the next one.

    • create

      OutboxDialect create()
      Creates a fresh dialect instance.
      Returns:
      a new OutboxDialect.

    • priority

      default int priority()
      Priority used to break ties when multiple providers report supports for the same database. Higher wins. Built-in providers return 0.
      Returns:
      the provider priority; higher values take precedence.
